test01_simple.description: Simple zero-arg procedure mutates a global variable.

test03_scope.description: Parameter scope isolation (Ex3): must print 5 then 3.

test05_recursion.description: Recursive factorial: fact(0)=1, fact(1)=1, fact(5)=120, fact(6)=720.

test06_shadowing.description: Parameter name shadows a global: caller's n (7) must survive the call even though callee reassigns its local n.

test07_return_in_expr.description: Return value used as operand in arithmetic: triple(4) + triple(5) = 12 + 15.

test08_nested_call.description: Nested procedure calls: result of times2(5)=10 becomes argument to add1, giving 11.

test09_conditional_return.description: Conditional return path (abs): value depends on which IF branch runs. 5, -8, 0 -> 5, 8, 0.
